title: Early research on Deep Depth Colorization
desc: I was one of the researchers of the primary version of Deep Depth Colorization project, where we proposed a novel approach of colorizing the depth data using a deep neural network architecture. The early paper of this work is archived at Computing Research Repository (CoRR).

title: VANDAL’s dataset preparation
desc: I assisted in the preparation of VANDAL’s dataset. This dataset is a large collection of hand picked 3D CAD models and rendered depth images. This research project is published in ICRA 2017.

title: Freelancer
desc: I developed several android applications and libraries for different companies.

title: Bachelor Training Course
location: ATSYS Electrical/Electronic Manufacturing Company, Tehran, Iran
desc: I developed several modules using Java programming language for the Company’s Content Management System, also I assisted with the network’s infrastructure. It was a part of my training course which I passed during my bachelor degree.

title: Freelancer
desc: I developed an application for statistical purposes for Pangan Avaran Company which was written in C#, also I developed a CMS Android application for a website called Armandownload.
